scripts.start: node -e "const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const types={'.html':'text/html; charset=utf-8','.css':'text/css; charset=utf-8','.js':'text/javascript; charset=utf-8','.svg':'image/svg+xml','.xml':'application/xml; charset=utf-8','.txt':'text/plain; charset=utf-8','.webmanifest':'application/manifest+json; charset=utf-8'};const root=process.cwd();http.createServer((req,res)=>{let urlPath=decodeURIComponent(new URL(req.url,'http://localhost').pathname);let file=path.join(root,urlPath==='/'?'index.html':urlPath);if(!file.startsWith(root)){res.writeHead(403);return res.end('Forbidden')}fs.readFile(file,(err,data)=>{if(err){res.writeHead(404);return res.end('Not found')}res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':types[path.extname(file)]||'application/octet-stream'});res.end(data)})}).listen(3000,()=>console.log('Serving static site at http://localhost:3000'))"
